message:
feat(core): add anytime-valid e-process drift detector types (ft-2p9cb.4.2.1)

EProcessKind (CusumLike/Mixture/ConfidenceSequence), DriftObservable,
DriftAlertLevel, EProcessConfig, EProcessObservation, EProcessSnapshot,
EProcessDetector with log-space e-value tracking, Welford online stats,
ring buffer history, warmup, auto-reset. 26 unit tests (491 total).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
